# rocket_artillery2
#   year=2004 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_artillerya1
#   year=2008 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_artillery3
#   year=2016 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

arm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_novum_vexillum = {
    # motorized_rocket_unit â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = motorized_rocket_unit }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            has_tech = rocket_artillery
        }
        add_technology = motorized_rocket_unit
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rocket_artillery4 â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = rocket_artillery4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = rocket_artillery4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_rockets_improved_guidance â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_rockets_improved_guidance }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = sp_rockets_improved_guidance
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rocket_engines â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = rocket_engines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = rocket_engines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_rockets_rocket_bomber â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_rockets_rocket_bomber }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = sp_rockets_rocket_bomber
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # jet_engines â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = jet_engines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = jet_engines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_1 â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_rockets_improved_rocket_bomber â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_rockets_improved_rocket_bomber }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = sp_rockets_improved_rocket_bomber
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_rocket_engines â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_rocket_engines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = improved_rocket_engines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_rocket_engines â€” 1946
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_rocket_engines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1946 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = advanced_rocket_engines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_2 â€” 1946
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1946 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rocket_artillery â€” 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = rocket_artillery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = rocket_artillery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # experimental_rockets â€” 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = experimental_rockets }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = experimental_rockets
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rocket_artillery2 â€” 2004
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = rocket_artillery2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2004 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = rocket_artillery2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rocket_artillerya1 â€” 2008
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = rocket_artillerya1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2008 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = rocket_artillerya1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rocket_artillery3 â€” 2016
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = rocket_artillery3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2016 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = rocket_artillery3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ LAND / ANTI_AIR (14 techs) â”€â”€

# coldwar_antiair
#   year=1980 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_antiair0
#   year=1980 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# interwar_antiair
#   year=2000 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_antiair1
#   year=2000 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair1
#   year=2004 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair2
#   year=2008 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair3
#   year=2012 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_antiair2
#   year=2012 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair4
#   year=2016 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair5
#   year=2020 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair6
#   year=2024 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_antiair3
#   year=2024 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair7
#   year=2028 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair8
#   year=2032 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_land_anti_air_novum_vexillum = {
    # coldwar_antiair â€” 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = coldwar_antiair }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = coldwar_antiair
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_antiair0 â€” 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_antiair0 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = sp_antiair0
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # interwar_antiair â€” 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = interwar_antiair }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = interwar_antiair
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_antiair1 â€” 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_antiair1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = sp_antiair1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair1 â€” 2004
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2004 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair2 â€” 2008
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2008 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair3 â€” 2012
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2012 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_antiair2 â€” 2012
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_antiair2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2012 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = sp_antiair2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair4 â€” 2016
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2016 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair5 â€” 2020
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2020 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair6 â€” 2024
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2024 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair6
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_antiair3 â€” 2024
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_antiair3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2024 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = sp_antiair3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair7 â€” 2028
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair7 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2028 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair7
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair8 â€” 2032
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair8 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2032 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair8
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ LAND / ANTI_TANK (12 techs) â”€â”€

# mountain_tanks
#   year=1936 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# SWE_bofors_antitank_gun
#   year=1936 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# coldwar_antitank
#   year=1980 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# interwar_antitank
#   year=2000 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank1
#   year=2004 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank2
#   year=2008 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank3
#   year=2012 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank4
#   year=2016 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank5
#   year=2020 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank6
#   year=2024 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank7
#   year=2028 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank8
#   year=2032 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_land_anti_tank_novum_vexillum = {
    # mountain_tanks â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mountain_tanks }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = mountain_tanks
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SWE_bofors_antitank_gun â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = SWE_bofors_antitank_gun }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = SWE_bofors_antitank_gun
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # coldwar_antitank â€” 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = coldwar_antitank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = coldwar_antitank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # interwar_antitank â€” 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = interwar_antitank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = interwar_antitank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank1 â€” 2004
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antitank1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2004 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank2 â€” 2008
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antitank2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2008 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank3 â€” 2012
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antitank3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2012 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank4 â€” 2016
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antitank4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2016 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank5 â€” 2020
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antitank5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2020 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank6 â€” 2024
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antitank6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2024 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank6
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank7 â€” 2028
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antitank7 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2028 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank7
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank8 â€” 2032
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antitank8 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2032 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank8
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ LAND / ARTILLERY (20 techs) â”€â”€

# railway_gun
#   year=1936 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# coldwar_artillery
#   year=1936 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery1
#   year=1939 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# basic_dp_light_battery
#   year=1939 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_artillery_rocket_assisted_projectiles_tech
#   year=1940 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_artillery_purpose_built_gun_motor_carriages_tech
#   year=1940 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# improved_dp_light_battery
#   year=1940 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery3
#   year=1941 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_shock_hardening_techniques
#   year=1941 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_variable_time_fuze_shells
#   year=1942 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery5
#   year=1943 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# advanced_dp_light_battery
#   year=1944 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# gw_artillery
#   year=2000 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_artillery1
#   year=2000 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# interwar_artillery
#   year=2004 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery2
#   year=2008 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_artillery2
#   year=2012 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery4
#   year=2016 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery6
#   year=2024 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_artillery3
#   year=2024 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_land_artillery_novum_vexillum = {
    # railway_gun â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = railway_gun }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = railway_gun
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # coldwar_artillery â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = coldwar_artillery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = coldwar_artillery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # artillery1 â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = artillery1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = artillery1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_dp_light_battery â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_dp_light_battery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_dp_light_battery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_artillery_rocket_assisted_projectiles_tech â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_artillery_rocket_assisted_projectiles_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = sp_artillery_rocket_assisted_projectiles_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_artillery_purpose_built_gun_motor_carriages_tech â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_artillery_purpose_built_gun_motor_carriages_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = sp_artillery_purpose_built_gun_motor_carriages_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_dp_light_battery â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_dp_light_battery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_dp_light_battery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # artillery3 â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = artillery3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = artillery3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_shock_hardening_techniques â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_shock_hardening_techniques }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = sp_shock_hardening_techniques
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }

            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery

        add_technology = artillery5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_dp_light_battery }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    # gw_artillery â€” 2000

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = gw_artillery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2000 }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }

    # artillery4 â€” 2016

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2016 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }

# â”€â”€ LAND / HEAVY_TANKS (13 techs) â”€â”€

# basic_heavy_tank
#   year=1934 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=1934 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1940 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=1941 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_weapon_fire_control_tech
#   year=1945 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_novum_vexillum = {
    # basic_heavy_tank â€” 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        add_technology = basic_heavy_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_heavy_tank_chassis â€” 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = basic_heavy_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_heavy_tank_chassis â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }

            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }

    }
    # improved_heavy_tank â€” 1941

            NOT = { has_tech = improved_heavy_tank }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }

        }

            NOT = { has_tech = super_heavy_tank }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }

            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

    # sp_armored_lc_weapon_fire_control_tech â€” 1945

            NOT = { has_tech = sp_armored_lc_weapon_fire_control_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }

# â”€â”€ LAND / INFANTRY (106 techs) â”€â”€

# infantry_weapons
#   year=1918 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# rangers_tech
#   year=1936 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# special_forces_mountaineers
#   year=1936 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0 [XP_GATED]

arm_grant_land_infantry_novum_vexillum = {
    # infantry_weapons â€” 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = infantry_weapons }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_weapons
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rangers_tech â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = rangers_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = rangers_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): special_forces_mountaineers

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_special_forces â€” 2002
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_special_forces }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2002 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = tech_special_forces
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

# â”€â”€ LAND / LIGHT_TANKS (23 techs) â”€â”€

# gwtank
#   year=1918 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# gwtank_chassis
#   year=1918 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_light_tank
#   year=1934 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1934 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_light_tank
#   year=1936 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1936 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1941 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# mechanised_infantry1
#   year=1960 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# IFV_chassis_80s
#   year=1960 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# light_tank1
#   year=1980 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# mechanised_infantry2
#   year=1980 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# IFV_chassis
#   year=1980 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# light_tank2
#   year=2000 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# IFV_chassis_00s
#   year=2000 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# light_tank3
#   year=2006 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# mechanised_infantry3
#   year=2006 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# IFV_chassis_10s
#   year=2010 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# light_tank4
#   year=2012 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# mechanised_infantry4
#   year=2018 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# IFV_chassis_20s
#   year=2020 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# light_tank5
#   year=2024 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# mechanised_infantry5
#   year=2024 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_land_light_tanks_novum_vexillum = {
    # gwtank â€” 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = gwtank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = gwtank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # gwtank_chassis â€” 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = gwtank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = gwtank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_tank â€” 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_tank_chassis â€” 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_light_tank â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_light_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = improved_light_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_light_tank_chassis â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = improved_light_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_light_tank â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_light_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = advanced_light_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_light_tank_chassis â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_light_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanised_infantry1 â€” 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # IFV_chassis_80s â€” 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = IFV_chassis_80s }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = IFV_chassis_80s
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # light_tank1 â€” 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = light_tank1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = light_tank1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanised_infantry2 â€” 1980

            NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    # IFV_chassis â€” 1980

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1980 }

            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"

            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2006 }

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = IFV_chassis_10s
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # light_tank4 â€” 2012
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = light_tank4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2012 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = light_tank4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanised_infantry4 â€” 2018
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2018 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # IFV_chassis_20s â€” 2020
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = IFV_chassis_20s }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2020 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = IFV_chassis_20s
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # light_tank5 â€” 2024
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = light_tank5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2024 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = light_tank5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanised_infantry5 â€” 2024

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2024 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ LAND / MECHANISED (12 techs) â”€â”€

# mechanised_infantry
#   year=1940 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry
#   year=1941 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2
#   year=1943 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# light_mechanized_infantry1
#   year=1960 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# light_mechanized_infantry2
#   year=1980 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry1
#   year=2000 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# light_mechanized_infantry3
#   year=2006 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# light_mechanized_infantry4
#   year=2012 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry2
#   year=2012 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[mechanised_infantry3]

# light_mechanized_infantry5
#   year=2018 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry3
#   year=2024 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[mechanised_infantry4]

# light_mechanized_infantry6
#   year=2030 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_land_mechanised_novum_vexillum = {
    # mechanised_infantry â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # amphibious_mechanized_infantry â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_mechanized_infantry }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2 â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # light_mechanized_infantry1 â€” 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = light_mechanized_infantry1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = light_mechanized_infantry1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # light_mechanized_infantry2 â€” 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = light_mechanized_infantry2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = light_mechanized_infantry2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # amphibious_mechanized_infantry1 â€” 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_mechanized_infantry1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # light_mechanized_infantry3 â€” 2006
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = light_mechanized_infantry3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2006 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = light_mechanized_infantry3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # light_mechanized_infantry4 â€” 2012
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = light_mechanized_infantry4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2012 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = light_mechanized_infantry4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # amphibious_mechanized_infantry2 â€” 2012
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_mechanized_infantry2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2012 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
            has_tech = mechanised_infantry3
        }
        add_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # light_mechanized_infantry5 â€” 2018
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = light_mechanized_infantry5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2018 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = light_mechanized_infantry5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # amphibious_mechanized_infantry3 â€” 2024
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_mechanized_infantry3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2024 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
            has_tech = mechanised_infantry4
        }
        add_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # light_mechanized_infantry6 â€” 2030
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = light_mechanized_infantry6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2030 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = light_mechanized_infantry6
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

#   year=1940 branch=land category=medium_tanks

# improved_medium_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_medium_tank
#   year=1943 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_medium_tank_chassis
#   year=1943 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tank1
#   year=1960 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tank2
#   year=1980 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tank_chassis_80s
#   year=1980 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tank3
#   year=2000 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tank_chassis_00s
#   year=2000 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tank4
#   year=2006 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tank_chassis_10s
#   year=2010 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tank5
#   year=2012 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tank6
#   year=2018 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tank_chassis_20s
#   year=2020 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tank7
#   year=2024 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tank8
#   year=2030 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tank_chassis_30s
#   year=2030 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# IFV_chassis_30s
#   year=2030 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_novum_vexillum = {
    # basic_medium_tank_chassis â€” 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_medium_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = basic_medium_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_medium_tank â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_medium_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        add_technology = basic_medium_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_medium_tank_chassis â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_medium_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = improved_medium_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_medium_tank â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_medium_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        add_technology = improved_medium_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_medium_tank â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_medium_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks

# â”€â”€ LAND / MODERN_TANKS (2 techs) â”€â”€

# main_battle_tank
#   year=1945 branch=land category=modern_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# main_battle_tank_chassis
#   year=1960 branch=land category=modern_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_land_modern_tanks_novum_vexillum = {
    # main_battle_tank â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = main_battle_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_modern_tanks
        }
        add_technology = main_battle_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # main_battle_tank_chassis â€” 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = main_battle_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_modern_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = main_battle_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ LAND / MOTORISED (11 techs) â”€â”€

# motorised_infantry

#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

#   year=2012 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# motorised_infantry4
#   year=2018 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# motorised_infantry5
#   year=2030 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

arm_grant_land_motorised_novum_vexillum = {
    # tech_trucks â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_trucks }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = tech_trucks
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # motorised_infantry â€” 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = motorised_infantry }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = motorised_infantry
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # motorised_infantry1 â€” 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = motorised_infantry1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised

    # nonsnb_technicality_tech â€” 1980

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = nonsnb_technicality_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = nonsnb_technicality_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # technicality_tech â€” 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = technicality_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1980 }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2000 }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised

arm_grant_land_support_novum_vexillum = {
    # armored_train â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = armored_train }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = armored_train
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_recon_focus_bonus â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_recon_focus_bonus }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_recon_focus_bonus

    }

arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_novum_vexillum = {
    # armored_car1 â€” 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = armored_car1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = armored_car1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_td â€” 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_td }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_td
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_art â€” 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_art }

            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }

        }
        add_technology = advanced_medium_art
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_medium_spaa â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_medium_spaa }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = advanced_medium_spaa
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_heavy_td â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_heavy_td }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = advanced_heavy_td
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_heavy_art â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_heavy_art }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = advanced_heavy_art
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_heavy_spaa â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_heavy_spaa }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = advanced_heavy_spaa
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # super_heavy_td â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = super_heavy_td }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = super_heavy_td
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # super_heavy_art â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = super_heavy_art }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = super_heavy_art
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # super_heavy_spaa â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = super_heavy_spaa }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = super_heavy_spaa
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_td â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = modern_td }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = modern_td
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_art â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = modern_art }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = modern_art
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_spaa â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = modern_spaa }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # armor_tech_1 â€” 1980

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = armor_tech_1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = armor_tech_1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # engine_tech_1 â€” 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = engine_tech_1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = engine_tech_1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # armor_tech_2 â€” 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = armor_tech_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2000 }

            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    # armor_tech_4 â€” 2010
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = armor_tech_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2010 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }

    # engine_tech_4 â€” 2010
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = engine_tech_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2010 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }

            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }

    # armor_tech_6 â€” 2030

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = armor_tech_6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2030 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
