    # engine_tech_6 â€” 2030
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = engine_tech_6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2030 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = engine_tech_6
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ NAVAL / BATTLESHIPS (20 techs) â”€â”€

# early_battlecruiser
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ship_hull_super_heavy
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_heavy_armor_scheme
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 [XP_GATED]

# improved_heavy_armor_scheme
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 [XP_GATED]

# basic_battlecruiser
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# early_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=1980 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# early_battleship
#   year=1980 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=2000 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_battleship
#   year=2000 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# heavy_battleship
#   year=2000 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=2008 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_battleship
#   year=2008 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=2016 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_battleship
#   year=2016 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# heavy_battleship2
#   year=2016 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# near_future_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=2024 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# near_future_battleship
#   year=2024 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# future_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=2032 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# future_battleship
#   year=2032 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# heavy_battleship3
#   year=2032 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_naval_battleships_novum_vexillum = {
    # early_battlecruiser â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_battlecruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = early_battlecruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ship_hull_super_heavy â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ship_hull_super_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ship_hull_super_heavy
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): basic_heavy_armor_scheme
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): improved_heavy_armor_scheme
    # basic_battlecruiser â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_battlecruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = basic_battlecruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_ship_hull_heavy â€” 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = early_ship_hull_heavy
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_battleship â€” 1980

            NOT = { has_tech = early_battleship }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1980 }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships

            NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_heavy }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2032 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = heavy_battleship3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ NAVAL / CARRIERS (20 techs) â”€â”€

# sp_refined_pykrete
#   year=1942 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_ice_composite_runawayas
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# early_ship_hull_carrier

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=2000 branch=naval category=carriers

#   year=2008 branch=naval category=carriers

# improved_carrier

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=2024 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# future_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=2032 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=2032 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# future_carrier
#   year=2032 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_naval_carriers_novum_vexillum = {
    # sp_refined_pykrete â€” 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_refined_pykrete }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = sp_refined_pykrete
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_ice_composite_runawayas â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_ice_composite_runawayas }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = sp_ice_composite_runawayas
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_ship_hull_carrier â€” 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = early_ship_hull_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ship_hull_fleet_carrier â€” 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ship_hull_fleet_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ship_hull_fleet_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_carrier â€” 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = early_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_ship_hull_carrier â€” 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_ship_hull_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_ship_hull_fleet_carrier â€” 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_fleet_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_ship_hull_fleet_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_carrier â€” 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = basic_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_ship_hull_carrier â€” 2008
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2008 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_ship_hull_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_ship_hull_fleet_carrier â€” 2008
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_ship_hull_fleet_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2008 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_ship_hull_fleet_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_carrier â€” 2008

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2008 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }

        }

    # advanced_ship_hull_fleet_carrier â€” 2016

            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }

#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

arm_grant_naval_destroyers_novum_vexillum = {
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): improved_depth_charges
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): advanced_depth_charges
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): modern_depth_charges
    # modern_sonar â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = modern_sonar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = modern_sonar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_ship_hull_light â€” 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = early_ship_hull_light
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # smoke_generator â€” 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = smoke_generator }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = smoke_generator
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sonar â€” 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sonar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = sonar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_destroyer â€” 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_destroyer }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = early_destroyer
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): basic_depth_charges
    # basic_ship_hull_light â€” 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_ship_hull_light
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_ship_hull_patrol_boat â€” 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_patrol_boat }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_ship_hull_patrol_boat
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_sonar â€” 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_sonar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_sonar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_destroyer â€” 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_destroyer }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers

        add_technology = basic_destroyer
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    # basic_patrol_boat â€” 2000

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = basic_patrol_boat
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_ship_hull_light â€” 2008
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2008 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_ship_hull_light
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_sonar â€” 2008
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_sonar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2008 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_sonar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_destroyer â€” 2008
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_destroyer }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2008 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = improved_destroyer
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_patrol_boat â€” 2008
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_patrol_boat }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2008 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = improved_patrol_boat
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_ship_hull_light â€” 2016
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2016 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_ship_hull_light
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # upgraded_sonar â€” 2016
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = upgraded_sonar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2016 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = upgraded_sonar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_destroyer â€” 2016
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_destroyer }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2016 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_destroyer
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_patrol_boat â€” 2016
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_patrol_boat }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers

            NOT = { has_tech = near_future_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2024 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = near_future_ship_hull_light
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # near_future_sonar â€” 2024

            NOT = { has_tech = near_future_sonar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }

            NOT = { has_tech = near_future_patrol_boat }

            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers

            NOT = { has_tech = future_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = future_ship_hull_light
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # future_sonar â€” 2032

            NOT = { has_tech = future_sonar }

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers

# â”€â”€ NAVAL / HEAVY_CRUISERS (6 techs) â”€â”€

# early_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1980 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_heavy_cruiser
#   year=2000 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_heavy_cruiser
#   year=2008 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_heavy_cruiser
#   year=2016 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# near_future_heavy_cruiser
#   year=2024 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# future_heavy_cruiser
#   year=2032 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_novum_vexillum = {
    # early_heavy_cruiser â€” 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = early_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_heavy_cruiser â€” 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = basic_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_heavy_cruiser â€” 2008
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2008 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = improved_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_heavy_cruiser â€” 2016
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2016 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # near_future_heavy_cruiser â€” 2024
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = near_future_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2024 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = near_future_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # future_heavy_cruiser â€” 2032
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = future_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2032 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = future_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ NAVAL / LIGHT_CRUISERS (20 techs) â”€â”€

# early_ship_hull_cruiser

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# early_light_cruiser
#   year=1980 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_ship_hull_cruiser

# basic_cruiser_armor_scheme

# improved_airplane_launcher
#   year=2000 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_light_cruiser

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_cruiser_armor_scheme
#   year=2008 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 [XP_GATED]

# improved_light_cruiser
#   year=2008 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_airplane_launcher
#   year=2012 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=2016 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 [XP_GATED]

# advanced_light_cruiser

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# near_future_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=2024 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# near_future_cruiser_armor_scheme
#   year=2024 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 [XP_GATED]

# near_future_airplane_launcher
#   year=2024 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# near_future_light_cruiser
#   year=2024 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# future_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=2032 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# future_cruiser_armor_scheme
#   year=2032 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 [XP_GATED]

# future_light_cruiser
#   year=2032 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_novum_vexillum = {
    # early_ship_hull_cruiser â€” 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = early_ship_hull_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_light_cruiser â€” 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_light_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = early_light_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_ship_hull_cruiser â€” 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_ship_hull_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): basic_cruiser_armor_scheme
    # improved_airplane_launcher â€” 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_airplane_launcher }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_airplane_launcher
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_cruiser â€” 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_ship_hull_cruiser â€” 2008
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2008 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_ship_hull_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): improved_cruiser_armor_scheme
    # improved_light_cruiser â€” 2008
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_light_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2008 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = improved_light_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_airplane_launcher â€” 2012
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_airplane_launcher }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2012 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_airplane_launcher
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_ship_hull_cruiser â€” 2016
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2016 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_ship_hull_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): advanced_cruiser_armor_scheme
    # advanced_light_cruiser â€” 2016
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_light_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2016 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_light_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # near_future_ship_hull_cruiser â€” 2024
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = near_future_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2024 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = near_future_ship_hull_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): near_future_cruiser_armor_scheme
    # near_future_airplane_launcher â€” 2024
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = near_future_airplane_launcher }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2024 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = near_future_airplane_launcher
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # near_future_light_cruiser â€” 2024
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = near_future_light_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2024 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = near_future_light_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # future_ship_hull_cruiser â€” 2032
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = future_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2032 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = future_ship_hull_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): future_cruiser_armor_scheme
    # future_light_cruiser â€” 2032
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = future_light_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2032 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = future_light_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ NAVAL / NAVAL_SUPPORT (46 techs) â”€â”€

# submarine_mine_laying
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=naval_support
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

arm_grant_naval_naval_support_novum_vexillum = {
    # submarine_mine_laying â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = submarine_mine_laying }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = submarine_mine_laying
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_naval_mines â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_naval_mines }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # near_future_light_battery â€” 2024
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = near_future_light_battery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2024 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = near_future_light_battery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # near_future_heavy_battery â€” 2024
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = near_future_heavy_battery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2024 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = near_future_heavy_battery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # future_ship_torpedo_launcher â€” 2032
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = future_ship_torpedo_launcher }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2032 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = future_ship_torpedo_launcher
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # future_light_battery â€” 2032
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = future_light_battery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2032 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = future_light_battery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # future_heavy_battery â€” 2032
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = future_heavy_battery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2032 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = future_heavy_battery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# sp_aip_engine_improved_tech

# improved_submarine_snorkel

#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

# sp_aip_engine_advanced_tech

# early_ship_hull_submarine

#   year=2032 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

arm_grant_naval_submarines_novum_vexillum = {
    # basic_submarine_snorkel â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_submarine_snorkel }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_submarine_snorkel
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_aip_engine_improved_tech â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_aip_engine_improved_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = sp_aip_engine_improved_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): improved_submarine_snorkel
    # sp_aip_engine_advanced_tech â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_aip_engine_advanced_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = sp_aip_engine_advanced_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_ship_hull_submarine â€” 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
